# Local Ads Metrics

## Core KPIs
- Cost per inbox
- Cost per lead
- Survey booking rate
- Quote rate
- Close rate

## Quality Checks
- Are leads in the right service area?
- Are they asking for a real project or just browsing?
- Do they match the intended budget band?
- Are they responding after the first proof message?

## Optimization Moves
- High clicks, low inbox: fix hook or CTA.
- Cheap leads, weak quality: narrow audience or change offer.
- Good leads, high cost: improve proof and landing message before scaling.
- Strong conversion in one area: split it into a dedicated ad set or campaign.
